security.csp: default-src 'self'; connect-src 'self' http://127.0.0.1:1433 http://localhost:1433; img-src 'self' asset: data: http://127.0.0.1:1433 http://localhost:1433; media-src 'self' http://127.0.0.1:1433 http://localhost:1433; style-src 'self' 'unsafe-inline'; script-src 'self'; worker-src 'self' blob:

bundle.shortDescription: Long-form text, DOCX and PDF reader
bundle.longDescription: BookReader imports long text, DOCX and PDF files, divides them into chapters, and reads chapters aloud with local speech synthesis.
